## Product check

- [ ] Arabic-first copy preserved
- [ ] RTL layout checked with logical classes (`start/end`, `ms/me`, `ps/pe`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, patient data, or demo credentials committed
- [ ] No medical diagnosis/advice added to AI behavior
- [ ] Revenue/user value is clear
